case.title: DRAKE v. METROPOLITAN LIFE INS CO

opinion.h1: DRAKE v. METROPOLITAN LIFE INS CO, 296 U.S. 632 (1935)
opinion.h2: Tracy C. DRAKE, John B. Drake, et al., petitioners, v. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al.* No. 460.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Charles C. LeForgee, of Decatur, Ill., and Edwin W. Sims, of Chicago, Ill., for petitioners.
For opinion below, see Metropolitan Life Ins. Co. v. Whitestone Management Co., 77 F.(2d) 255.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 664, 56 S. Ct. 247.[ Drake v. Metropolitan Life Ins Co 296 U.S. 632 (1935) ]
